use_codes.desc: ACUTE TREATMENT OF MIGRAINE ATTACKS WITH OR WITHOUT AURA IN ADULTS

indications.text:
ZOMIG is indicated for the acute treatment of migraine with or without aura in adults.
Limitations of Use
 Only use ZOMIG if a clear diagnosis of migraine has been established. If a patient has no response to ZOMIG
treatment for the first migraine attack, reconsider the diagnosis of migraine before...
